issue.message: Attribute `localeConfig` is only used in API level 33 and higher (current min is 28)
Found dynamic locale changes, but did not find corresponding Play Core library calls for downloading languages and splitting by language is not disabled in the `bundle` configuration
Your app is currently not handling Selected Photos Access introduced in Android 14+

Constructing a view model in a composable

Fixed screen orientations will be ignored in most cases, starting from Android 16. Android is moving toward a model where apps are expected to adapt to various orientations, display sizes, and aspect ratios.

Fixed screen orientations will be ignored in most cases, starting from Android 16. Android is moving toward a model where apps are expected to adapt to various orientations, display sizes, and aspect ratios.

Formatting %d followed by words ("photos"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("photos"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("seconds"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Missing x86_64 ABI support for ChromeOS
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 28. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `MusicSongLibrary` which has field `context` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak
Do not place Android context classes in static fields; this is a memory leak
Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `OverlayFrameLibrary` which has field `context` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak
Do not place Android context classes in static fields; this is a memory leak
Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `TransitionSetLibrary` which has field `context` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak
Do not place Android context classes in static fields; this is a memory leak
Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `TransitionLoader` which has field `context` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak
Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `VideoTemplateLibrary` which has field `context` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak
Do not place Android context classes in static fields; this is a memory leak
This initialization lambda (`{ 0 }`) is unnecessary and is less efficient

Assigning `Locale.getDefault()` to a final static field is suspicious; this code will not work correctly if the user changes locale while the app is running
issue.errorLine1: private val projectDateFormatter = SimpleDateFormat("MMM dd, yyyy", Locale.getDefault())
